name: yoloop
description: A local-first sequential agent-loop harness for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Run durable worker-critic coding loops from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Yoloop to initialize durable goal, plan, task, policy, context, log, and verdict artifacts, then run a sequential worker-critic-grand-jury loop through local agent adapters.
defaultPrompt: Set up Yoloop for this repo.
